comments.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py`. Python script reads file paths from stdin (one per line), computes blast-radius score using: (a) path depth — shallow config paths score higher, (b) known config/entry/wiring file names (~40 cross-stack patterns in module-level KNOWN_PATTERNS dict: main.*, routes.*, app.*, index.{ts,js}, lib.rs, Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, setup.cfg, next.config.*, webpack.config.*, Makefile, Dockerfile, docker-compose.*, .github/workflows/*, etc.), (c) directory conventions (config/, utils/, shared/, lib/, pkg/, internal/, cmd/), (d) layer count (distinct top-level directories), (e) change type detection. Default threshold: 5. Graceful on empty stdin (score=0).

Outputs JSON: {"score": <int>, "signals": [...], "complex_override": <bool>, "layer_count": <int>, "change_type": "<enum>"}

TDD: Task e934-fb6d RED tests go GREEN.

### File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py`
- Edit: `.test-index` (remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py
- [ ] Script exists and executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py
- [ ] Valid JSON output with all fields
  Verify: echo "main.py" | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert all(k in d for k in ['score','signals','complex_override','layer_count','change_type'])"
- [ ] Contains >=40 known patterns
  Verify: python3 -c "exec(open('plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py').read()); assert len(KNOWN_PATTERNS) >= 40"
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'blast-radius-score.py.*test-blast-radius-score.sh' .test-index | grep -v '\['
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — GREEN task) ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs pass: executable, valid JSON, 97 KNOWN_PATTERNS (≥40), RED marker removed, ruff clean, 14 tests all PASS
